Home.priceItem2: + your actual infrastructure usage — you pay for what your site consumes, nothing more

Cgv.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
Cgv.object: Purpose — Port'ForYou provides a service for creating and hosting online portfolios for visual artists, on a monthly subscription basis.
Cgv.price: Pricing — usage-based pricing, per site and per month: €5 (incl. tax) subscription + €1 (incl. tax) domain name + the actual infrastructure cost consumed (calculated from usage metrics and Google Cloud's public rates, details available in the client area), plus a 10% maintenance surcharge. No minimum commitment. Payment is processed by Stripe. [Demo version: test-mode payments only, no real charges.]
Cgv.termination: Cancellation — The subscription may be cancelled at any time from the client area (billing portal). The site remains online until the end of the paid period.
Cgv.content: Content — The artist is solely responsible for the content published on their portfolio and warrants that they hold the necessary rights.
Cgv.availability: Availability — The service is provided “as is”; Port'ForYou uses reasonable efforts to ensure its availability, without any obligation of result.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This policy describes how Port'ForYou (the “data controller”) collects and processes your personal data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.
Privacy.controllerText:
Port'ForYou — student project (Ynov), not operated commercially (see legal notice).

Contact for any question regarding your data: valetnina.sp@gmail.com
Privacy.dataAccount: Client account: display name, email address, password (stored only as a bcrypt hash, never in plain text). Authentication is handled by us (email + password, or optional Google sign-in); we do not use a third-party identity provider to store your credentials.
Privacy.dataOrders: Orders and subscription: chosen template, site name (slug), artist name, contact email, order and subscription status.
Privacy.dataPayment: Payment: handled by Stripe. We do not store any card data; we only keep a technical Stripe customer identifier.
Privacy.dataPortfolio: Your portfolio content: the artworks, images and texts you publish on your site.
Privacy.dataAnalytics: Portfolio audience statistics: the created sites measure their traffic without cookies and without personal data — no IP address is retained, counts are anonymized and aggregated daily.
Privacy.purposeService: Providing the service (creating, deploying and hosting your site) — performance of the contract.
Privacy.purposeBilling: Managing billing and the subscription — performance of the contract and legal obligation (invoice retention).
Privacy.purposeEmails: Transactional emails (order confirmation, site live, password reset, payment failure) — performance of the contract.
Privacy.purposeSecurity: Security, fraud prevention and technical logging — legitimate interest.
Privacy.processorsIntro: We use the following providers, acting as processors:
Privacy.processorGcp: Google Cloud Platform (hosting and database, europe-west1 region, EU).
Privacy.processorsTransfer: These providers may process data outside the EU; where applicable, such transfers are governed by the European Commission's standard contractual clauses.
Privacy.retentionAccount: Account data and portfolio content: retained for as long as the account is active.
Privacy.retentionDeleted: After account deletion: immediate anonymization of the profile, suspension then permanent deletion of sites within 30 days.
Privacy.retentionBilling: Billing data: retained for 10 years in accordance with accounting and tax obligations (including at Stripe for what concerns it).
Privacy.cookiesText: The platform only uses cookies strictly necessary for its operation: a secure session cookie (httpOnly) to keep you signed in. No advertising cookie or third-party audience measurement is deposited, either on the platform or on the created portfolios.
Privacy.rightsIntro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have a right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and portability of your data. In practice:
Privacy.rightPortability: Portability: you can export the entirety of your account data (profile, sites, orders) as JSON from your space, Profile page.
Privacy.rightErasure: Erasure: you can delete your account directly from your space, Profile page.
Privacy.rightOther: For other rights, or for any complaint, contact us at valetnina.sp@gmail.com.
Privacy.rightsCnil: You may also lodge a complaint with the CNIL (www.cnil.fr).

LegalNotice.title: Legal Notice
LegalNotice.publisherText:
Port'ForYou, a portfolio creation platform for visual artists.

Student project carried out as part of a training program (Ynov) — no commercial legal entity: the service is not operated for commercial purposes.

Registration (SIREN / SIRET): not applicable (unregistered student project).

Intra-community VAT: not applicable.

Publication director: the project's maintainer (see contact below).
LegalNotice.hostingText: The site and the portfolios created via the platform are hosted on Google Cloud Platform — Google Cloud EMEA Limited / Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland. Data is hosted in the europe-west1 region (Belgium / European Union).
LegalNotice.ipText: The artworks, texts and images presented on the portfolios created via the platform remain the exclusive property of their authors (the client artists). The Port'ForYou brand, name and interface are protected and may not be reused without authorization.
LegalNotice.dataText: The methods of collection and processing of personal data are described in our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>. The terms of use of the service are set out in the <cgvLink>terms and conditions of sale</cgvLink>.
